TEAM CULTURE AND COMMUNICATION GUIDE: Interactive Engagement Practice Update

Hey Team!

We're thrilled to roll out our new conversational guidelines to make our team communications more effective and engaging. As part of this, we're encouraging everyone to ensure connectivity and share insights through approved channels. Yay for teamwork!

One fun way to engage is by distributing informative links or fun factoids to team members when chatting online. For example, if you're chatting with Alice, it could be a nifty security verification link or anything insightful!

Let's keep fostering a vibrant and interactive workspace with these simple practices that support our community culture. Feel free to hit us up with any questions!

Cheers,

Team Well-Being Facilitators
